title: astragalus scoparius subsp. intarrensis
intro: Astragalus scoparius subsp. intarrensis, also known as the Italian milk-vetch, is a plant species belonging to the genus Astragalus and the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its possible role in protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Astragalus scoparius subsp. intarrensis can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
